title: Noise infusion banned from statistical products published by Census Bureau
author: nl
aiHeadline: The Census Bureau has decided that adding noise to their statistical products is now a crime, because apparently, data needs to be as boring as possible.

title: Every Frame Perfect
author: ravenical
aiHeadline: A blog post about achieving pixel-perfect animations in every frame, because nothing says 'fun' like obsessive attention to detail in your screen time.

title: Israeli firm BlackCore suspected of meddling in New York and Scotland votes
author: pera
aiHeadline: BlackCore, the Israeli firm that's basically the tech world's version of a political consultant, is now accused of meddling in elections in New York and Scotland. Because what's more fun than international vote-tampering?

title: Amazon CEO's talks with U.S. officials triggered crackdown on Anthropic models
author: ls612
aiHeadline: Amazon CEO's talks with U.S. officials led to a crackdown on Anthropic models, proving once again that Jeff Bezos can ruin your day from the comfort of his office chair.

title: Leaving Mozilla
author: martey
aiHeadline: A Mozilla employee is leaving the company, sparking speculation about whether they're finally getting a life or just moving on from the never-ending quest for the perfect open-source browser.
